title: Mobile Engineering
desc: Production experience across Flutter, Swift/UIKit, SwiftUI, and Kotlin — including complex native integrations, build pipelines, and lifecycle management.

title: Spatial Computing
desc: Early visionOS developer. RealityKit, ARKit, hand-tracking gesture systems, custom animation via FromToByAnimation, and spatial UI architecture.

title: Web & Backend

title: AI & Research

title: Architecture & Systems
